\tzpentry{ID4562}{Coupled Quantum Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4562 introduces Coupled Quantum Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{d\rho}{dt} = -\frac{i}{\hbar}[\hat{H}, \rho] + \sum_n \gamma_n \left(L_n \rho L_n^{\dagger} - \frac{1}{2}\{L_n^{\dagger} L_n, \rho\}\right) \end{equation}
